### ACS plots

```{r}


aim1_map_data %>% # proportion of those who drive
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:d_A1_nyc), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
   mutate_at(vars(lwc_A2:lwc_A15_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  mutate(m = (estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  plot_access_map(m,"E") +

aim1_map_data %>% # proportion of those who do not drive
  mutate(`m-1` = 1 - (estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  plot_access_map(`m-1`,"E") +

aim1_map_data %>% # proportion of those who walk 
  mutate(`m-2` = (estimate_walked/estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  plot_access_map(`m-2`,"E") 


aim1_map_data %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_density(aes(x = 1 - (estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans), fill = "Non-Driving proportion"),alpha = 0.3)+
  geom_density(aes(x = estimate_walked/estimate_total_trans, fill = "Walked proportion"),alpha = 0.3)+
  geom_density(aes(x = estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans, fill = "Driving proportion"),alpha = 0.3)+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")+
  labs(x = "")


aim1_map_data %>% # proportion of those who drive
  mutate(m = (estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_sf(aes(fill = m)) +

aim1_map_data %>% # proportion of those who do not drive
  mutate(`m-1` = 1 - (estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_sf(aes(fill = `m-1`)) +

aim1_map_data %>% # proportion of those who walk 
  mutate(`m-2` = 1 - (estimate_walked/estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_sf(aes(fill = `m-2`))
  

common_limits <- c(0, 1)

# Proportion of those who drive
p1 <- aim1_map_data %>% 
  mutate(m = estimate_car_truck_van / estimate_total_trans) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = m)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(limits = common_limits, low ="darkblue", high =  "lightblue")

# Proportion of those who do not drive
p2 <- aim1_map_data %>% 
  mutate(`m-1` = 1 - (estimate_car_truck_van / estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = `m-1`)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(limits = common_limits, low = "darkblue", high = "lightblue")

# Proportion of those who walk 
p3 <- aim1_map_data %>% 
  mutate(`m-2` =  (estimate_walked / estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = `m-2`)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(limits = common_limits, low ="darkblue", high =  "lightblue")

p1 + p2 +p3

aim1_map_data %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID,estimate_walked, estimate_car_truck_van,estimate_total_trans) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    c(estimate_walked:estimate_total_trans),
    names_to = ""
  )


# Create labels for each polygon
diff_labels_p <- paste0(
  "Tract: ", aim1_map_data$GEOID, "<br/>",
  "driving prop: ", aim1_map_data %>% mutate(m = estimate_car_truck_van / estimate_total_trans) %>% pull(m) %>% round(2), "<br/>",
  "non-driving prop: ", aim1_map_data %>% mutate(`m-1` = 1 - (estimate_car_truck_van / estimate_total_trans)) %>% pull(`m-1`)%>% round(2), "<br/>",
  "walking prop: ", aim1_map_data %>% mutate(`m-2` = 1 - (estimate_walked / estimate_total_trans)) %>% pull(`m-2`)%>% round(2)
) %>% lapply(htmltools::HTML)

# Define a color palette based on lwc_A5 values.
diff_pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "viridis",              # or choose your preferred palette
  domain = aim1_map_data$lwc_A5,      # use lwc_A5 as the domain for the color scale
  na.color = "#808080"
)

aim1_map_data %>% 
  sf::st_transform(crs = 4263) %>% 
  leaflet() %>% 
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>% 
  addPolygons(
    fillColor = ~diff_pal(lwc_A5),   # fill based on lwc_A5
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    color = "gray",                  # polygon border color
    weight = 0.5,
    opacity = 1,
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(
      weight = 2,
      color = "blue",
      fillOpacity = 0.9,
      bringToFront = TRUE
    ),
    label = diff_labels_p,           # use the label object created above
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      style = list("font-weight" = "bold", "color" = "black"),
      textsize = "12px",
      direction = "auto"
    )
  ) %>% 
  addLegend(
    pal = diff_pal,
    values = ~lwc_A5,
    title = "lwc_A5",
    opacity = 1,
    position = "topright"
  )


aim1_map_data %>% # proportion of those who drive
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:d_A1_nyc), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
   mutate_at(vars(lwc_A2:lwc_A15_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  mutate(`Prop Drive` = (estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans)) %>% 
  plot_access_map(`Prop Drive`,"E")
```

## SES + LWC5

```{r}

 load("/Volumes/chidslab/Adherence-Prediction/Geocoding and Neighbourhood Data/SES/Acs_clean_ses_2019.RData")

aim1_acs_lwc5 = aim1_map_data %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  left_join(acs_clean_ses_2019 %>% 
  
 mutate(county = substr(geoid,1,5)) %>% 
  # filters to NYC counties and counties that are connected by land
  filter(county %in% c(36005,
                 36047,
                 36061,
                 36081,
                 36085
         )) %>% rename("GEOID"="geoid"),
            by = "GEOID" ) 
  
  # ggplot(aes(x =AHRQ_SES_2019, y = median ))+
  # geom_line()+
  # geom_smooth(method = "lm")

aim1_acs_lwc5 %>% 
ggplot(aes(y = lwc_A5, x =  AHRQ_SES_2019))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "gam")+
  facet_wrap(~county,scale = "free")

ses_vars <- aim1_acs_lwc5 %>% select(hhinc_med_rescale:AHRQ_SES_2019) %>% names()

# Compute correlations
results <- lapply(ses_vars, function(var) {
  test <- cor.test(aim1_acs_lwc5$lwc_A5, aim1_acs_lwc5[[var]], method = "spearman")
  data.frame(
    variable = var,
    rho = test$estimate,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
})

results <- do.call(rbind, results)


all_data_lwc5 = aim1_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:d_A1_nyc), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
   mutate_at(vars(lwc_A2:lwc_A15_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
                   mutate(lwcq = case_when(lwc_A5 <= quantile(lwc_A5,0.33,na.rm = T) ~ 1,
                                           lwc_A5 > quantile(lwc_A5,0.33,na.rm = T) & lwc_A5 <= quantile(lwc_A5,0.67,na.rm = T) ~ 2,
                                           lwc_A5 > quantile(lwc_A5,0.67,na.rm = T) ~ 3),
                          lwcq = factor(lwcq)
                          ) %>% rename("geoid" = "GEOID") %>% 
                   left_join(read_csv("./data/nyc_transit_walkability_51022.csv") %>% 
              filter(geo_level == "tract",
                     data_yr_type == "2019") %>% 
  mutate(walkability = as.numeric(estimate),
         geoid = as.character(geoid)), 
  by = "geoid") %>% 
    left_join(pop_cen_nyc %>% select(geoid,population),
              by = "geoid") %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/neighborhood_data.csv") %>% select(
  GEOID,
  hisp_pc,
  raceeth_nonhisp_white_pc,
  raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc,
  raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc
) %>% group_by(GEOID) %>% 
  mutate(raceeth_other_pc = 1 -sum(hisp_pc,raceeth_nonhisp_white_pc,raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc,
raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)) %>% rename("geoid" = "GEOID"), by = "geoid") %>% 
  mutate(lwcq_levels = case_when(
    lwc_A5< 1 ~ "Dessert",
    lwc_A5 >= 1 & lwc_A5 <= quantile(lwc_A5, 0.33, na.rm = T) ~ "Low access",
    lwc_A5 > quantile(lwc_A5, 0.33, na.rm = T) & lwc_A5 <= quantile(lwc_A5, 0.67, na.rm = T) ~ "Medium access",
    lwc_A5 > quantile(lwc_A5, 0.67, na.rm = T) ~ "High access"
  ),
  ses_q = case_when(
    AHRQ_SES_2019 <= quantile(AHRQ_SES_2019,0.33, na.rm= T) ~ "Low",
    AHRQ_SES_2019 > quantile(AHRQ_SES_2019,0.33, na.rm= T) & AHRQ_SES_2019 <= quantile(AHRQ_SES_2019,0.67, na.rm= T) ~ "Medium",
    AHRQ_SES_2019 > quantile(AHRQ_SES_2019,0.67, na.rm= T) ~"High"
  ),
  lwcq_levels = forcats::fct_relevel(lwcq_levels, "Dessert", "Low access", "Medium access", "High access"),
  lwcq_levels = factor(lwcq_levels, ordered = TRUE)) 

arsenal::tableby(lwcq_levels ~ population.x + lwc_A5 +walkability+ p_A5+hisp_pc+
  raceeth_nonhisp_white_pc+
  raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+
  raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc+pov_below_pc+unemploy_pc+edu_coll_pc+edu_lths_pc+hhinc_med_rescale+crowd_pc+hhvalue_med_rescale+AHRQ_SES_2019+county,
                 data = all_data_lwc5 ,
                 control = my_controls
                 ) %>% 
  summary()
           

pharm_sf %>% 
  group_by(geoid)
      
all_data_lwc5 = read_csv("./data/all_data_2026.csv")


"36005" = "Bronx", 
                         "36047" = "Brooklyn", 
                         "36061" = "Manhattan", 
                         "36081" = "Queens", 
                         "36085" = "Staten Island")) 
```

Essentially as access increases, social economic status goes down. This suggests that pharmacy access is higher among less afluent neighborhoods, regarless of the county.

### correlations

```{r}
counties = c(36005,
                 36047,
                 36061,
                 36081,
                 36085
         )

results_c <- lapply(counties, function(county) {
  test <- cor.test(aim1_acs_lwc5$median[aim1_acs_lwc5$county == county], aim1_acs_lwc5$AHRQ_SES_2019[aim1_acs_lwc5$county == county], method = "spearman")
  data.frame(
    variable = county,
    rho = test$estimate,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
})

results_c <- do.call(rbind, results_c)

results_c_36005 <- lapply(ses_vars, function(var) {
  test <- cor.test(aim1_acs_lwc5$median[aim1_acs_lwc5$county == 36005], aim1_acs_lwc5[[var]][aim1_acs_lwc5$county == 36005], method = "spearman")
  data.frame(
    variable = var,
    rho = test$estimate,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
})

results_c_36005 <- do.call(rbind, results_c_36005)

# most notable: As access increases, inc d, pov u, unp u, col d, no high u, crowd up, ses d

results_c_36047 <- lapply(ses_vars, function(var) {
  test <- cor.test(aim1_acs_lwc5$median[aim1_acs_lwc5$county == 36047], aim1_acs_lwc5[[var]][aim1_acs_lwc5$county == 36047], method = "spearman")
  data.frame(
    variable = var,
    rho = test$estimate,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
})

# most notable: As access increases, inc d, unp u, no high u, crowd up, ses d

results_c_36085 <- lapply(ses_vars, function(var) {

  data.frame(
```

```{r}
 LWC_5_chain = lwc_access(

                   pnts_c = pnts_car_5_chain %>% 
            rename("query" ="name"),

            rename("query" ="name"),

                   iso_w = isochrones_walk_5, 
                    n_sims = 100) %>% 
          rename("geoid" = "GEOID", 
                 "lwc_A5"= "median_A",

                 "p_A5" = "mean_p") 

LWC_5_chain_map %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>%

  geom_histogram(aes(x = lwc_A5), fill = "green", alpha = 0.5)+ # lwc_A5 are for pharmacies based on the indicator

              left_join(LWC_5_chain, by = "geoid") %>%
              pull(lwc_A5),
            aim1_acs_lwc5 %>% 
              left_join(LWC_5_chain, by = "geoid") %>%

    (aim1_acs_lwc5 %>% 
              left_join(LWC_5_chain, by = "geoid"))[[var]], method = "spearman")
  data.frame(
    variable = var,
    rho = test$estimate,
    p_value = test$p.value
  )
})

  plot_access_3_map <- function(data, var_name, color_option) {
  # Dynamically rename and calculate quantiles
  data <- data %>%
    rename(A_g = {{ var_name }}) %>%
    mutate(Ag_q = case_when(
     # A_g == 0 ~ "0",
    #  A_g > 0 &
        
        A_g <= quantile(A_g, 0.33, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "1",
      A_g > quantile(A_g, 0.33, na.rm = TRUE) & A_g <= quantile(A_g, 0.67, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "2",
      A_g > quantile(A_g, 0.67, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "3"
    ))

  # Plot the map
  ggplot(data) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = Ag_q)) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(
      option = color_option,
      name = as.character(substitute(var_name)),  # Dynamic legend name
      na.value = "gray60"  # NA values in gray
    )
  }
  
  plot_access_3_map <- function(data, var_name, color_option) {

  data2 <- data %>%
    rename(A_g = {{ var_name }}) %>%
    mutate(
      Ag_q = case_when(
        is.na(A_g) ~ NA_character_,
        A_g == 0 ~ "0",
        A_g <= quantile(A_g[A_g > 0], 1/3, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "1",
        A_g <= quantile(A_g[A_g > 0], 2/3, na.rm = TRUE) ~ "2",
        TRUE ~ "3"
      ),
      Ag_q = factor(Ag_q, levels = c("0","1","2","3"))
    )

  ggplot(data2) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = Ag_q), color = NA) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(
      option = color_option,
      name = rlang::as_name(rlang::enquo(var_name)),
      na.value = "gray60",
      drop = FALSE
    )
}

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% plot_access_3_map("AHRQ_SES_2019", color_option = "D")+
  aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% rename("5 min LWC" = "median")  %>% plot_access_3_map("5 min LWC", color_option = "D")
  
  
LWC_5_chain_map %>% plot_access_3_map("AHRQ_SES_2019", color_option = "D")+
  LWC_5_chain_map %>% rename("chain_access" = "lwc_A5") %>% plot_access_3_map("chain_access", color_option = "D")
```

```{r}

get_cutpoints <- function(full_data, var_name){
  x <- full_data %>% dplyr::pull({{var_name}})
  x_pos <- x[x > 0]
  c(q33 = quantile(x_pos, 1/3, na.rm=TRUE),
    q67 = quantile(x_pos, 2/3, na.rm=TRUE))
}

plot_access_3_map_fixed <- function(data, var_name, color_option, cuts){

  data2 <- data %>%
    rename(A_g = {{ var_name }}) %>%
    mutate(
      Ag_q = case_when(
        is.na(A_g) ~ NA_character_,
        A_g == 0 ~ "0",
        A_g <= cuts["q33"] ~ "1",
        A_g <= cuts["q67"] ~ "2",
        TRUE ~ "3"
      ),
      Ag_q = factor(Ag_q, levels=c("0","1","2","3"))
    )

  ggplot(data2) +
    geom_sf(aes(fill=Ag_q), color=NA) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option=color_option, na.value="gray60", drop=FALSE)
}

cuts <- get_cutpoints(aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry(), median)

plot_access_3_map_fixed(aim1_map_acs_lwc5, median, "C", cuts)
plot_access_3_map_fixed(LWC_5_chain_map, lwc_A5, "C", cuts)
plot_access_3_map_fixed(LWC_5_independent_map, lwc_A5, "C", cuts)
```

```{r}

meas_3_func <- function(measure){

  tibble(measure) %>%  
   mutate(measure_q = case_when(measure <= quantile(measure, 0.33, na.rm = T) ~ "1",
                                measure> quantile(measure, 0.33, na.rm = T) & measure <= quantile(measure, 0.67, na.rm = T) ~ "2",
                                measure > quantile(measure,0.67, na.rm = T) ~ "3")
          ) %>% 
    pull(measure_q)
  
}

aim1_acs_lwc5 %>% 
              left_join(LWC_5_independent %>% 
                          select(lwc_A5,geoid) %>% 
                rename("ind_access" = "lwc_A5" ), 
                by = "geoid") %>%
  left_join(LWC_5_chain %>% 
                          select(lwc_A5,geoid) %>% 
                rename("chain_access" = "lwc_A5" ), 
                by = "geoid") %>% 
  rename("overall_access" = "median") %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(ind_access, chain_access, overall_access), ~meas_3_func(.) ) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    hhinc_med_rescale:AHRQ_SES_2019,
    values_to = "measure",
    names_to = "vars"
  ) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    c(overall_access, ind_access, chain_access),
    values_to = "level",
    names_to = "access_type"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(access_type = forcats::fct_relevel(access_type, "overall_access", "ind_access", "chain_access")) %>% 
  na.omit() %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = vars, y = measure, fill = factor(level)), outliers = F)+
  labs(y = "Percent",x = "")+
  facet_wrap(~access_type)+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.6)
  )+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2", name = "Pharmacy Access Level")


```

# Hypothesis Testing

```{r}


meas_q_func <- function(measure){

  tibble(measure) %>%  
   mutate(measure_q = case_when(measure <= quantile(measure, na.rm = T)[2] ~ "1",
                                measure> quantile(measure, na.rm = T)[2] & measure <= quantile(measure, na.rm = T)[3] ~ "2",
                                measure > quantile(measure, na.rm = T)[3] & measure <= quantile(measure, na.rm = T)[4] ~ "3",
                                measure > quantile(measure, na.rm = T)[4] ~ "4")) %>% 
    pull(measure_q)
  
}

arsenal::tableby(RPL_THEMES~w_A5+c_A5+lwc_A5,
  data = aim1_map_data %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID") %>% 
    mutate_at(vars(RPL_THEME1,RPL_THEME2,RPL_THEME3,RPL_THEME4,RPL_THEMES), meas_q_func)%>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 ), 
         RPL_THEMES >=0),
  control = my_controls
) %>% 
  summary()


aim1_map_data %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID") %>% 
    mutate_at(vars(RPL_THEME1,RPL_THEME2,RPL_THEME3,RPL_THEME4,RPL_THEMES), meas_q_func) %>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 )) %>% 
  
  ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = RPL_THEMES,y = lwc_A5, fill= "a"), outliers = F)+

#  geom_boxplot(aes(x = RPL_THEMES,y = w_A5, fill= "c"), outliers = F)+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2")

    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
```

```{r}


bi_data =aim1_map_data %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID") %>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 ),
         RPL_THEMES >=0)

bi_map = aim1_map_data %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID") %>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 ),
         RPL_THEMES >=0)

by_data_class <- bi_class(bi_map, x = RPL_THEMES, y = lwc_A5, style = "quantile", dim = 3)

meas_3_func <- function(measure){

  tibble(measure) %>%  
   mutate(measure_q = case_when(measure <= quantile(measure,0.33, na.rm = T) ~ "Low",
                                measure> quantile(measure,0.33, na.rm = T) & measure <= quantile(measure,0.67, na.rm = T) ~ "Medium",
                                measure > quantile(measure,0.67, na.rm = T) ~ "High")) %>% 
    pull(measure_q) %>% forcats::fct_relevel("Low","Medium","High")
  
}

bi_map_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = by_data_class, mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "GrPink", dim = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    subtitle = ""
  ) +
  bi_theme()+


# individual plots ---------



by_data_class %>%
   mutate_at(vars(RPL_THEME1,RPL_THEME2,RPL_THEME3,RPL_THEME4,RPL_THEMES), meas_3_func)%>% 
ggplot() +
  geom_sf( mapping = aes(fill = RPL_THEMES), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Low" = "#e8e8e8", "Medium" = "#e38686", "High" = "#b2182b"),  # Gray to red gradient
    name = "Social Vulnerability"
  ) +
  labs(title = "Social Vulnerability") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_blank())+

by_data_class %>% 
   mutate_at(vars(RPL_THEME1,RPL_THEME2,RPL_THEME3,RPL_THEME4,RPL_THEMES,lwc_A5), meas_3_func) %>% 
ggplot() +
  geom_sf( mapping = aes(fill = factor(lwc_A5)), color = "white", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Low" = "#e8e8e8", "Medium" = "#64acbe", "High" = "#005b96"),  # Gray to blue gradient
    name = "Pharmacy Availability"
  ) +
  labs(title = "Pharmacy Availability (LWC_A5)") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_blank())
```

# Models

## census tract

```{r}

priors <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 100)", class = "b"),          # for regression coefficients
  set_prior("normal(0, 100)", class = "Intercept")#,    # for the intercept
 #set_prior("cauchy(0, 2.5)", class = "sd")             # for random effect standard deviations
)
# Bayesian quantile regression model with a random intercept for GEOID
fit_geoid <- brm(
  formula = bf(lwc_A5 ~ RPL_THEMES + (1 | GEOID), quantile = 0.5),
  data = aim1_map_data %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID") %>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 ),
         RPL_THEMES>=0),
  family = asym_laplace(link = "identity"),
  prior = priors,
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 500,
  cores = 4,
  seed = 123
)

# Summarize the model
summary(fit_geoid)

# Bayesian quantile regression model with a random intercept for GEOID
fit_county <- brm(
  formula = bf(lwc_A5 ~ RPL_THEMES + (1 | county.x), quantile = 0.5),
  data = aim1_map_data %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID")%>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 ),
          RPL_THEMES>=0) %>% 
     mutate_at(vars(RPL_THEME1,RPL_THEME2,RPL_THEME3,RPL_THEME4,RPL_THEMES), meas_q_func),
  family = asym_laplace(link = "identity"),
  chains = 4,
  prior = priors,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 500,
  cores = 4,
  seed = 123
)

# Summarize the model
summary(fit_county)
```

## County level

```{r}


library(lavaan)

# Define the SEM model
# - Measurement model: latent variable PharmAccess is indicated by lwc_A5, c_A5, and w_A5
# - Structural model: PharmAccess is regressed on RPL_THEMES
model <- '
  # Measurement model
  PharmAccess =~ lwc_A5 + c_A5 + w_A5
  
  # Structural model
  PharmAccess ~ RPL_THEMES
'

# Fit the SEM with a complex sampling correction for clustering by county
fit <- sem(model,
           data =  aim1_map_data %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID")%>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 ),
         RPL_THEMES>=0),
           cluster = "county.x",   # specify your county variable
           estimator = "MLR")    # robust maximum likelihood estimator

# Summarize the results with standardized estimates and fit measures
summary(fit, standardized = TRUE, fit.measures = TRUE)
```

## Characterizing 5 min and 1 mile access scores

```{r}

comp_data = aim1_map_data %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    left_join(read_csv("./data/SVI.csv") %>% rename("GEOID" = "FIPS") %>%
                select(GEOID,contains("RPL_THE")) %>% 
                mutate(GEOID = as.character(GEOID)),
              by = "GEOID") %>% 
  mutate(
    w_A5_=w_A5, 
    c_A5_ = c_A5,
    lwc_A5_ = lwc_A5, 
    d_A1_ = d_A1
  ) %>% 
    mutate_at(
              vars(w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5, d_A1), meas_3_func) %>% 
  mutate(RPL_THEMES = if_else(RPL_THEMES >= 0, RPL_THEMES, NA_real_),
         RPL_THEME1 = if_else(RPL_THEME1 >= 0, RPL_THEME1, NA_real_),
         RPL_THEME2 = if_else(RPL_THEME2 >= 0, RPL_THEME2, NA_real_),
         RPL_THEME3 = if_else(RPL_THEME3 >= 0, RPL_THEME3, NA_real_),
         RPL_THEME4 = if_else(RPL_THEME4 >= 0, RPL_THEME4, NA_real_))%>% 
  left_join(read_csv("./data/nyc_transit_walkability_51022.csv") %>% 
              filter(geo_level == "tract",
                     data_yr_type == "2019") %>% 
  mutate(walkability = as.numeric(estimate),
         geoid = as.character(geoid)) %>% 
    rename("GEOID" = "geoid"), by = "GEOID") %>% 
  filter(substr(GEOID,1,5) %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 ))
  
arsenal::tableby(w_A5~ population+ p_A5+ pharm_count+ pharm_den+ SIR +w_A5_+ walkability +RPL_THEMES+RPL_THEME1+RPL_THEME2+RPL_THEME3+RPL_THEME4,
                 data = comp_data,
                 control = my_controls) %>% 
  summary(test = T)

arsenal::tableby(c_A5~ population+ p_A5+ pharm_count+ pharm_den+ SIR +c_A5_+ walkability+ RPL_THEMES+RPL_THEME1+RPL_THEME2+RPL_THEME3+RPL_THEME4,
                 data = comp_data,
                 control = my_controls) %>% 
  summary(test = T)

arsenal::tableby(lwc_A5~ population+ p_A5+ pharm_count+ pharm_den+ SIR +lwc_A5_+ walkability+ RPL_THEMES+RPL_THEME1+RPL_THEME2+RPL_THEME3+RPL_THEME4,
                 data = comp_data,
                 control = my_controls) %>% 
  summary(test = T)


arsenal::tableby(d_A1~ population+ p_A5+ pharm_count+ pharm_den+ SIR +d_A1_+ walkability+ RPL_THEMES+RPL_THEME1+RPL_THEME2+RPL_THEME3+RPL_THEME4,
                 data = comp_data,
                 control = my_controls) %>% 
  summary(test = T)

```

```{r}



aim1_data %>%
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:d_A1_nyc), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
   mutate_at(vars(lwc_A2:lwc_A15_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  full_join(
    data1,
    by = "geoid"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    row = row_number()) %>% 
  filter(county.x %in% c(36005, 36047, 36061, 36081, 36085)) %>% 
  select(geoid,county.x, w_A5:w_A2,lwc_A2,lwc_A5,d_A1, lwc_A10, lwc_A15, c_A5:c_A2) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(
    w_A5:c_A2,
    names_to = "score_name",
    values_to = "scores"
    
  ) %>% 
  separate(score_name, into = c("mode","time"), sep = "_") %>% 
 
  mutate(mode = forcats::fct_relevel(mode, "w","c","d","lwc"),
         time = forcats::fct_relevel(time,"A1", "A2","A5","A10", "A15"),
         county = recode(county.x, 
                         "36005" = "Bronx", 
                         "36047" = "Brooklyn", 
                         "36061" = "Manhattan", 
                         "36081" = "Queens", 
                         "36085" = "Staten Island")) %>%
  filter(time %in% c("A5")) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = mode, y = scores, fill = mode), outliers = F)+
  facet_wrap(~county) +
 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(#axis.text.x = element_blank(),  # Hide x-axis text for readability
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom")+
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")


aim1_map_data_f = tigris::geo_join(
    map_shp,
    aim1_data_final %>%
   mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  full_join(
    data1,
    by = "geoid"
  ) %>% filter(county %in% c(36005,36047,36061,36081,36085 )) ,
    by_sp = "GEOID",
    by_df = "geoid",
    how = "inner")

aim1_data_final %>%
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(.<1,0,.)) %>% 
  full_join(
    data1,
    by = "geoid"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    row = row_number()) %>% 
  filter(county %in% c(36005, 36047, 36061, 36081, 36085)) %>% 
  select(geoid,county, w_A5,c_A5, lwc_A5) %>%
  
  pivot_longer(
    w_A5:lwc_A5,
    names_to = "score_name",
    values_to = "scores"
    
  ) %>% 
  separate(score_name, into = c("mode","time"), sep = "_") %>% 
 
  mutate(mode = forcats::fct_relevel(mode, "w","c","lwc"),
         county = recode(county, 
                         "36005" = "Bronx", 
                         "36047" = "Brooklyn", 
                         "36061" = "Manhattan", 
                         "36081" = "Queens", 
                         "36085" = "Staten Island")) %>%
  filter(time %in% c("A5")) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = mode, y = scores, fill = mode), outliers = F)+
  facet_wrap(~county) +
 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(#axis.text.x = element_blank(),  # Hide x-axis text for readability
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")+
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set3")

 aim1_data_final %>%
  mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(., 0)) %>% 
   mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(., 0)) %>% 
  full_join(data1, by = "geoid") %>% 
  mutate(row = row_number()) %>% 
  filter(county %in% c(36005, 36047, 36061, 36081, 36085),
         row %in% sample(2222, 100)) %>% 
  select(geoid, w_A5:w_A2, lwc_A2:lwc_A15_0.975, c_A5:c_A2, row) %>%
  mutate(row = as.factor(row)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes( group = 1)) +
  geom_line(aes(x = reorder(row, lwc_A5),y = lwc_A5), col = "orange", size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(aes(x = reorder(row, lwc_A5),y = lwc_A5_0.025), col = "purple", size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_line(aes(x = reorder(row, lwc_A5),y = lwc_A5_0.975), col = "gray", size = 1, alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(title = "LWC 5min Access Scores and Confidence Intervals",
       x = "Census Tract",
       y = "Access Score") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set2", name = "Estimate")
  
 
  aim1_map_data_f %>%
  mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(., 0)) %>% 
  mutate(row = row_number()) %>% 
  filter(county.x %in% c(36005, 36047, 36061, 36081, 36085)) %>% 
    mutate(ind = if_else(lwc_A5_0.975-lwc_A5 >=1 | lwc_A5 -lwc_A5_0.025 >= 1, 1, 0)) %>% 
  #  filter(ind == 1) %>% 
    group_by(ind) %>% 
    summarize(n = n())
    ggplot()+
    geom_sf(aes( fill = factor(ind)))
```

```{r}

priors_ordinal <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "b"),          # fixed effects
  set_prior("exponential(1)", class = "sd"),       # random effects SDs
  set_prior("normal(0, 5)", class = "Intercept")   # thresholds
)

pharm_formula <- bf(
 lwcq_levels ~ ses_q + (1 | county.x)
)

mod1 <- brm(
  formula = pharm_formula,
  data    = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry(),
  family  = cumulative("logit"),
  prior   = priors_ordinal,
  chains  = 4,
  cores   = 4,
  iter    = 4000,
  seed    = 123,
  
)

#plot(mod1)

#summary(mod1)

pharm_formula2 <- bf(
 lwcq_levels ~ ses_q+hisp_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc + (1 | county.x)
)

mod2 <- brm(
  formula = pharm_formula2,
  data    = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry(),
  family  = cumulative("logit"),
  prior   = priors_ordinal,
  chains  = 4,
  cores   = 4,
  iter    = 4000,
  seed    = 123,
  
)


#summary(mod2)

pharm_formula3 <- bf(
 lwcq_levels ~ ses_q+hisp_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc+walkability + (1 | county.x)
)

mod3 <- brm(
  formula = pharm_formula3,
  data    = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry(),
  family  = cumulative("logit"),
  prior   = priors_ordinal,
  chains  = 4,
  cores   = 4,
  iter    = 4000,
  seed    = 123,
  
)

summary(mod3)

#   ),

#summary(mod_int)

#   )
# )

# plot(ce_black_by_ses, points = TRUE)

# ce_asian_by_ses <- conditional_effects(
#   mod_int,
#   effects = "raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc",
#   categorical = TRUE,
#   conditions = data.frame(
#     ses_q = factor(c("Low", "Medium", "High"), levels = levels(aim1_map_acs_lwc5$ses_q))
#   )
# )

#plot(ce_asian_by_ses, points = TRUE)


pharm_formula_int2 <- bf(
  lwcq_levels ~ ses_q+
    raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
    raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc +
    hisp_pc +
    raceeth_other_pc+ walkability + ses_q:(raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
    raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc +
    hisp_pc +
    raceeth_other_pc)+
    (1 | county.x)
)

mod_int2 <- brm(
  formula = pharm_formula_int2,
  data    = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry(),
  family  = cumulative("logit"),
  prior   = c(
    set_prior("normal(0, 0.5)", class = "b"),      # stronger helps interactions
    set_prior("exponential(1)", class = "sd"),
    set_prior("normal(0, 2.5)", class = "Intercept")
  ),
  chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 4000, seed = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12)
)

summary(mod_int2)


# df <- aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry()
# 
# # population-average (re_formula = NA) predicted category probabilities for each tract
# p <- fitted(mod_int2, newdata = df, re_formula = NA, summary = TRUE)
# 
# # p is N x K matrix (K = #categories). Convert to df:
# p_df <- as.data.frame(p)
# p_df$ses_q <- df$ses_q
# 
# # Average across tracts within SES
# pred_marg_ses <- p_df %>%
#   group_by(ses_q) %>%
#   summarise(across(starts_with("Estimate"), mean, na.rm = TRUE))
# pred_marg_ses

```

```{r}
newdata <- aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>%
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  mutate(
    ses_q = factor(ses_q, levels = levels(factor(mod3$data$ses_q))),
    county.x = factor(county.x, levels = levels(factor(mod3$data$county.x)))
  )

ep <- posterior_epred(mod3, newdata = newdata, re_formula = NA)

# Mean probs across draws: N x K
p_mean <- apply(ep, c(2,3), mean)

# Category names (order matches your factor levels)
cats <- levels(factor(mod3$data$lwcq_levels))

# Modal category index for each tract
pred_class <- cats[max.col(p_mean, ties.method = "first")]

sf_pred <- aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>%
  mutate(pred_lwcq = factor(pred_class, levels = cats, ordered = TRUE))

ggplot(sf_pred) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = pred_lwcq)) +
  labs(fill = "Predicted access", title = "Model-predicted pharmacy access category") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## comparing scores

```{r}
aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
 # mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(.<1,0,.)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID,population,w_A5,c_A5,lwc_A5) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    w_A5:lwc_A5,
    names_to = "measures",
    values_to = "scores"
  ) %>% 
  group_by(measures) %>% 
  mutate(
    category = case_when(scores < 1~ "less than 1",
                         scores >=1 & scores < median(scores)~ "less than average",
                         scores > median(scores) ~ "greater than average")
  )


aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  #mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(.<1,0,.)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID,population,w_A5,c_A5,lwc_A5) %>% 
  summarize(bias = sum(population*(w_A5-lwc_A5))/sum(population))

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
 # mutate_at(vars(lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(. < 1, 0, .)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(population, w_A5, lwc_A5) %>% 
  mutate(delta = w_A5 - lwc_A5) %>% 
  summarize(
    rmse = sqrt(sum(population * delta^2) /
                sum(population))
  )

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  #mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(.<1,0,.)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID,population,w_A5,c_A5,lwc_A5) %>% 
  summarize(bias = sum(population*(c_A5-lwc_A5))/sum(population))

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
 # mutate_at(vars(lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(. < 1, 0, .)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(population, c_A5, lwc_A5) %>% 
  mutate(delta = c_A5 - lwc_A5) %>% 
  summarize(
    rmse = sqrt(sum(population * delta^2) /
                sum(population))
  )


aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  #mutate_at(vars(lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(. < 1, 0, .)) %>% 
  mutate(
    w_diff = case_when(
      lwc_A5 - w_A5 > 1  ~ "Diff > 1",
      w_A5 - lwc_A5 > 1  ~ "Diff < -1",
      TRUE               ~ "| Diff | < 1"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Diff > 1","| Diff | < 1","Diff < -1"))
  ) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = w_diff), size = 0.01) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Diff > 1" = "#2C7BB6",
      "| Diff | < 1"      = "grey30",
      "Diff < -1"= "#D7191C"
    ),
    name = ""
  ) +
  labs(title = "")+
  theme_void()
  
  
  aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  #mutate_at(vars(lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(. < 1, 0, .)) %>%

      c_A5 - lwc_A5 > 1  ~ "Diff < -1",

    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Diff > 1","| Diff | < 1","Diff < -1"))

  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = c_diff), size = 0.01) +
  scale_fill_manual(

      "| Diff | < 1"      = "grey20",
      "Diff < -1"= "#D7191C"
    ),
    name = ""
  ) +
  labs(title =  "")+
  theme_void()

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  select(GEOID, geometry, lwc_A5, c_A5, w_A5) %>%
  
  # reshape to long format
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(lwc_A5, c_A5, w_A5),
    names_to = "method",
    values_to = "access"
  ) %>%
  
  mutate(
    method = recode(method,
       "w_A5"   = "Walking Only",
      
      "c_A5"   = "Driving Only",
      
      "lwc_A5" = "Mode-Adjusted"
      
    ) %>% forcats::fct_relevel(.,"Walking Only","Driving Only","Mode-Adjusted"),
    
    access_bin = if_else(access < 1, 
                         "Lower than 1", 
                         "1 or greater"),
    
    access_bin = factor(access_bin, 
                        levels = c("Lower than 1", "1 or greater"))
  ) %>%
  
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = access_bin),size = 0.01) +
  facet_wrap(~method, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "1 or greater" = "#2C7BB6",
      "Lower than 1" = "#D7191C"
    ),
    name = ""
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12,vjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

  #mutate_at(vars(lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~if_else(. < 1, 0, .)) %>% 
  mutate(
    c_diff = case_when(
      lwc_A5 - c_A5 > 1  ~ "Underestimates (<-1)",
      c_A5 - lwc_A5 > 1  ~ "Overestimates (>1)",
      TRUE               ~ "Within ±1"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Overestimates (>1)",
  "Within ±1",
  "Underestimates (<-1)")),
    w_diff = case_when(
      lwc_A5 - w_A5 > 1  ~ "Underestimates (<-1)",
      w_A5 - lwc_A5 > 1  ~ "Overestimates (>1)",
      TRUE               ~ "Within ±1"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Overestimates (>1)",
  "Within ±1",
  "Underestimates (<-1)"))
  ) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(c_diff, w_diff),
    names_to = "comp",
    values_to = "diff"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
     comp = recode(comp,
       "w_diff"   = "Walking",
      
      "c_diff"   = "Driving"
  ) %>%  forcats::fct_relevel(.,"Walking"),
  diff = forcats::fct_relevel(diff, "Underestimates (<-1)","Within ±1" )
  
  ) %>% 
  
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = diff), size = 0.01) +
  facet_wrap(~comp, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Overestimates (>1)"= "#2C7BB6",
      "Within ±1"      = "grey20",
      
      "Underestimates (<-1)" = "#D7191C"
    ),
    name = ""
  ) +
  
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12,vjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )


```

## concordance

```{r}


tab_data <- aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5) %>% 
  left_join(
    lwc_access_fixed(
      data   = data1 %>% rename(query = address1, GEOID = geoid),
      pnts_c = pnts_car_5  %>% rename(query = address1),
      pnts_w = pnts_walk_5 %>% rename(query = address1),
      iso_c  = car_5,
      iso_w  = isochrones_walk_5
    ),
    by = "GEOID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    combined_bin = if_else(lwc_A5 < 1, "<1", ">=1"),
    walking_bin  = if_else(w_A5   < 1, "<1", ">=1"),
    driving_bin  = if_else(c_A5   < 1, "<1", ">=1")
  )

 tab_data %>%
  count(combined_bin, walking_bin) %>%
  group_by(combined_bin) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = walking_bin,
    values_from = pct,
    values_fill = 0
  )
 
 tab_data %>%
  count(combined_bin, driving_bin) %>%
  group_by(combined_bin) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = driving_bin,
    values_from = pct,
    values_fill = 0
  )
 
 tab_data %>%
  count(driving_bin, walking_bin) %>%
  group_by(driving_bin) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = walking_bin,
    values_from = pct,
    values_fill = 0
  )


 aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5) %>% 
  mutate(
    combined_bin = if_else(lwc_A5 < 1, 1, 0),
    walking_bin  = if_else(w_A5   < 1, 1, 0),
    driving_bin  = if_else(c_A5   < 1, 1, 0)
  ) %>% 
   summarize(c = sum(combined_bin),
             w = sum(walking_bin),
             d = sum(driving_bin))
   

```

## Model 1

```{r}

fit_m1 <- mgcv::gam(
  formula = lwc_A5~ s(AHRQ_SES_2019)+walkability+hisp_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc+county,
  data    = gam_data,
  family = mgcv::tw(link = "log"),
  method  = "REML"
)

fit_m1a <- mgcv::gam(
  formula = lwc_A5~  s(AHRQ_SES_2019)+walkability+hisp_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc,
  data    = gam_data,
  family = mgcv::tw(link = "log"),
  method  = "REML"
)


fit_m1a2 <- mgcv::gam(
  formula = lwc_A5~ AHRQ_SES_2019*walkability+hisp_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc,
  data    = gam_data,
  family = mgcv::tw(link = "log"),
  method  = "REML"
)

gratia::draw(fit_m1a, select = "s(AHRQ_SES_2019)")


fit_m1b <- mgcv::gam(
  formula = lwc_A5~ s(AHRQ_SES_2019)+hisp_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc+county,
  data    = gam_data,
  family = mgcv::tw(link = "log"),
  method  = "REML"
)

summary(fit_m1a2)
summary(fit_m1b)

summary(fit_m1)
mgcv::gam.check(fit_m1)

fit_m2a <- mgcv::gam(

)


fit_m2b <- mgcv::gam(

  data    = gam_data,

  method  = "REML"
)

  formula = lwc_A5~ hhinc_med_rescale+pov_below_pc+unemploy_pc+edu_coll_pc+edu_lths_pc+hhvalue_med_rescale+crowd_pc+walkability+hisp_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc+raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc+raceeth_other_pc+county,
  data    = gam_data,
  family = mgcv::tw(link = "log"),
  method  = "REML"
)

summary(fit_m2b)

BIC(fit_m2,fit_m1, fit_m3)
```

## assessing fit

```{r}


pred1 <- predict(fit_m1, type = "response")
obs1  <- gam_data$lwc_A5

cal1 <- tibble(obs = obs1, pred = pred1) |>
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred1, 20)) |>
  group_by(bin) |>
  summarise(pred_m = mean(pred), obs_m = mean(obs), .groups="drop")

plot(cal1$pred_m, cal1$obs_m,
     xlab = "Mean predicted (bin)",
     ylab = "Mean observed (bin)",
     pch = 16)
abline(0, 1, lwd = 2)


coefs1 <- summary(fit_m1)$p.table |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("term") |>
  filter(term != "(Intercept)")


pred2 <- predict(fit_m2, type = "response")
obs2  <- gam_data$lwc_A5

cal2 <- tibble(obs = obs2, pred = pred2) |>
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred2, 20)) |>
  group_by(bin) |>
  summarise(pred_m = mean(pred), obs_m = mean(obs), .groups="drop")

plot(cal2$pred_m, cal2$obs_m,
     xlab = "Mean predicted (bin)",
     ylab = "Mean observed (bin)",
     pch = 16)
abline(0, 1, lwd = 2)


coefs2 <- summary(fit_m2)$p.table |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("term") |>
  filter(term != "(Intercept)")


pred3 <- predict(fit_m3, type = "response")
obs3  <- gam_data$lwc_A5

cal3 <- tibble(obs = obs3, pred = pred3) |>
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred3, 20)) |>
  group_by(bin) |>
  summarise(pred_m = mean(pred), obs_m = mean(obs), .groups="drop")

plot(cal3$pred_m, cal3$obs_m,
     xlab = "Mean predicted (bin)",
     ylab = "Mean observed (bin)",
     pch = 16)
abline(0, 1, lwd = 2)


coefs3 <- summary(fit_m3)$p.table |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("term") |>
  filter(term != "(Intercept)")


rmse <- function(obs, pred) sqrt(mean((obs - pred)^2))
mae  <- function(obs, pred) mean(abs(obs - pred))

rmse1 <- rmse(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m1, type="response"))
rmse2 <- rmse(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m2, type="response"))
rmse3 <- rmse(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m3, type="response"))

mae1 <- mae(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m1, type="response"))
mae2 <- mae(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m2, type="response"))
mae3 <- mae(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m3, type="response"))

c(rmse1=rmse1, rmse2=rmse2, rmse3=rmse3,mae1=mae1, mae2=mae2,mae3=mae3)

rmse(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m1a, type="response"))
rmse(gam_data$lwc_A5, predict(fit_m1b, type="response"))
```

```{r}

# Compute exponentiated estimates and 95% CI
forest_df1 <- coefs1 |>
  mutate(
    estimate = exp(Estimate),
    conf.low = exp(Estimate - 1.96 * `Std. Error`),
    conf.high = exp(Estimate + 1.96 * `Std. Error`)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      term == "walkability" ~ "Walkability (1-100)",
      term == "hisp_pc" ~ "Hispanic (%)",
      term == "raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc" ~ "Non-Hispanic Black (%)",
      term == "raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc" ~ "Non-Hispanic Asian (%)",
      term == "raceeth_other_pc" ~ "Other race/ethnicity (%)",
      term == "county36047" ~ "Brooklyn",
      term == "county36005" ~ "Bronx",
      term == "county36081" ~ "Queens",
      term == "county36085" ~ "Staten Island",
      TRUE ~ term
    ) %>% factor(),
    label = forcats::fct_relevel(label,
                               "Staten Island",
                               "Queens",
                               "Bronx",
                               "Brooklyn",
                               "Other race/ethnicity (%)",
                               "Non-Hispanic Asian (%)",
                               "Non-Hispanic Black (%)",
                               "Hispanic (%)",
                               "Walkability (1-100)")
  ) 

ggplot(forest_df1,
       aes(x = estimate, y =label)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high),
                 height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(
    x = "Exponentiated coefficient (mean ratio)",
    y = "",
    title = "Adjusted associations with pharmacy access",
    subtitle = "Tweedie GAM with log link (Model 1)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

gratia::draw(fit_m1, select = "s(AHRQ_SES_2019)")
gratia::draw(fit_m1a, select = "s(AHRQ_SES_2019)")
gratia::draw(fit_m1b, select = "s(AHRQ_SES_2019)")

                               "Staten Island",

                               "Brooklyn",
```

```{r}


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# helper: make a curve for one focal group by reallocating from White
make_realloc_curve <- function(fit, data, focal,
                               grid_n = 200,
                               fixed_vals = c("mean", "mean")) {

  # variables in your model
  race_vars <- c("hisp_pc",
                 "raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc",
                 "raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc",
                 "raceeth_other_pc")

  stopifnot(focal %in% race_vars)

  # "typical" values for everything else
  base <- data %>%
    mutate(
  county = levels(gam_data$county)) %>% 
    summarise(
      AHRQ_SES_2019 = mean(AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
     # walkability  = mean(walkability,  na.rm = TRUE),
      hisp_pc = mean(hisp_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
      raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc = mean(raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
      raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc = mean(raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
      raceeth_other_pc = mean(raceeth_other_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

  # implied "baseline white" at the base point
  white0 <- 1 - (base$hisp_pc +
                 base$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
                 base$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc +
                 base$raceeth_other_pc)

  # max focal share so that white stays >= 0 (and focal stays <=1)
  max_focal <- min(1, base[[focal]] + white0)

  # create grid of focal values and reallocate from white
  newdat <- base[rep(1, grid_n), ]
  newdat[[focal]] <- seq(0, max_focal, length.out = grid_n)

  # compute resulting white share (not used in prediction because white omitted,
  # but used to define the valid range and for annotation if you want)
  newdat$nonhisp_white_pc <- 1 - (newdat$hisp_pc +
                                 newdat$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
                                 newdat$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc +
                                 newdat$raceeth_other_pc)

  # predict on outcome scale
  pr <- predict(fit, newdata = newdat, type = "response", se.fit = TRUE)

  out <- newdat %>%
    transmute(
      focal_group = focal,
      focal_pc = .data[[focal]],
      fit = pr$fit,
      lower = pr$fit - 1.96 * pr$se.fit,
      upper = pr$fit + 1.96 * pr$se.fit
    )

  out
}

focals <- c("hisp_pc",
            "raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc",
            "raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc",
            "raceeth_other_pc")

plot_df <- bind_rows(lapply(focals, \(v) make_realloc_curve(fit_m1a, gam_data, v)))


ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = focal_pc, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ focal_group, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Population proportion of focal group (reallocated from non-Hispanic White)",
    y = "Predicted pharmacy access score",
    title = "Adjusted associations from GAM (each curve reallocates from White)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

plot_df_c <- bind_rows(lapply(focals, \(v) make_realloc_curve(fit_m1b, gam_data, v)))


ggplot(plot_df_c, aes(x = focal_pc, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ focal_group, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Population proportion of focal group (reallocated from non-Hispanic White)",
    y = "Predicted pharmacy access score",
    title = "Adjusted associations from GAM (each curve reallocates from White)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
make_realloc_curve <- function(fit, data, focal,
                               grid_n = 200,
                               county_level = "36061",           # Manhattan default
                               walkability_value = NULL,         # if NULL, use mean
                               use_observed_range = TRUE,
                               obs_q = c(0.05, 0.95)) {

  race_vars <- c("hisp_pc",
                 "raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc",
                 "raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc",
                 "raceeth_other_pc")
  stopifnot(focal %in% race_vars)

  # Build a 1-row "base" newdata with required predictors
  base <- dplyr::summarise(
    data,
    AHRQ_SES_2019 = mean(AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
    hisp_pc = mean(hisp_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc = mean(raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc = mean(raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_other_pc = mean(raceeth_other_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  # Add walkability only if model uses it
  if ("walkability" %in% all.vars(stats::formula(fit))) {
    base$walkability <- if (is.null(walkability_value)) {
      mean(data$walkability, na.rm = TRUE)
    } else {
      walkability_value
    }
  }

  # Add county only if model uses it
  if ("county" %in% all.vars(stats::formula(fit))) {
    base$county <- factor(county_level, levels = levels(data$county))
  }

  # Compute implied baseline White share at base point (for feasibility)
  white0 <- 1 - (base$hisp_pc +
                 base$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
                 base$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc +
                 base$raceeth_other_pc)

  # Choose a realistic grid for the focal variable
  if (use_observed_range) {
    rng <- stats::quantile(data[[focal]], probs = obs_q, na.rm = TRUE)
    focal_min <- max(0, rng[[1]])
    focal_max <- min(rng[[2]], base[[focal]] + white0)  # keep White >= 0
  } else {
    focal_min <- 0
    focal_max <- min(1, base[[focal]] + white0)
  }

  newdat <- base[rep(1, grid_n), , drop = FALSE]
  newdat[[focal]] <- seq(focal_min, focal_max, length.out = grid_n)

  # For annotation / validity checking only
  newdat$nonhisp_white_pc <- 1 - (newdat$hisp_pc +
                                 newdat$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
                                 newdat$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc +
                                 newdat$raceeth_other_pc)

  pr <- predict(fit, newdata = newdat, type = "response", se.fit = TRUE)

  dplyr::tibble(
    focal_group = focal,
    focal_pc = newdat[[focal]],
    fit = pr$fit,
    lower = pr$fit - 1.96 * pr$se.fit,
    upper = pr$fit + 1.96 * pr$se.fit
  )
}

focals <- c("hisp_pc",
            "raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc",
            "raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc",
            "raceeth_other_pc")

# Walkability-adjusted model
plot_df_m1a <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(focals, \(v) make_realloc_curve(
  fit_m1a, gam_data, v,
  use_observed_range = TRUE
)))

# County-adjusted model (fix county to Manhattan, or choose another)
plot_df_m1b <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(focals, \(v) make_realloc_curve(
  fit_m1b, gam_data, v,
  county_level = "36061",
  use_observed_range = TRUE
)))



ggplot(plot_df_m1a, aes(x = focal_pc, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ focal_group, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Population proportion of focal group (reallocated from non-Hispanic White)",
    y = "Predicted pharmacy access score",
    title = "Adjusted associations from county-adjusted GAM (reallocated from White)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+

ggplot(plot_df_m1b, aes(x = focal_pc, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ focal_group, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    x = "Population proportion of focal group (reallocated from non-Hispanic White)",
    y = "Predicted pharmacy access score",
    title = "Adjusted associations from county-adjusted GAM (reallocated from White)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}

county_df <- expand.grid(
  county = levels(gam_data$county)
) %>%
  mutate(
    AHRQ_SES_2019 = mean(gam_data$AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
    hisp_pc = mean(gam_data$hisp_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
```

```{r}
fit_m1b_int <- mgcv::gam(
  lwc_A5 ~ s(AHRQ_SES_2019, by = county) +
           hisp_pc + raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
           raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc + raceeth_other_pc +
           county,
  data = gam_data,
  family = mgcv::tw(link = "log"),
  method = "REML"
)

ses_seq <- seq(
  min(gam_data$AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(gam_data$AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
  length.out = 200
)

newdat <- expand.grid(
  AHRQ_SES_2019 = ses_seq,
  county = levels(gam_data$county)
) %>%
  mutate(
    hisp_pc = mean(gam_data$hisp_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_other_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_other_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

## 3) Predict (response scale) with 95% CI
pr <- predict(fit_m1b_int, newdata = newdat, type = "response", se.fit = TRUE)

newdat <- newdat %>%
  mutate(
    fit   = pr$fit,
    lower = pr$fit - 1.96 * pr$se.fit,
    upper = pr$fit + 1.96 * pr$se.fit
  )

## 4) Plot: SES–access curves faceted by county
ggplot(newdat, aes(x = AHRQ_SES_2019, y = fit)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ county) +
  labs(
    x = "Neighborhood SES (AHRQ 2019)",
    y = "Predicted pharmacy access score",
    title = "Adjusted SES–access relationship by county (county-specific smooths)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Quantil GAM

```{r}
taus <- c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9)

# ---- Fit quantile GAMs (analog of your m1a) ----
fits_q <- lapply(taus, function(tau) {
  qgam(
    lwc_A5 ~ s(AHRQ_SES_2019) +
      walkability + hisp_pc + raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
      raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc + raceeth_other_pc,
    data = gam_data,
    qu = tau
  )
})
names(fits_q) <- paste0("q", taus)

# ---- Prediction grid over SES (adjusted: other covariates held at means) ----
ses_grid <- seq(
  min(gam_data$AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(gam_data$AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
  length.out = 200
)

newdat <- data.frame(
  AHRQ_SES_2019 = ses_grid,
  walkability = mean(gam_data$walkability, na.rm = TRUE),
  hisp_pc = mean(gam_data$hisp_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
  raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
  raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
  raceeth_other_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_other_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
)

# ---- Predict each quantile curve ----
pred_df <- bind_rows(lapply(names(fits_q), function(nm) {
  tau <- sub("^q", "", nm)
  fit <- fits_q[[nm]]

  # predict() returns fitted quantile on the outcome scale
  data.frame(
    AHRQ_SES_2019 = newdat$AHRQ_SES_2019,
    q = factor(tau, levels = c("0.1","0.5","0.9")),
    fit = as.numeric(predict(fit, newdata = newdat))
  )
}))

# ---- Plot: quantile SES–access relationships ----
ggplot(pred_df, aes(AHRQ_SES_2019, fit, group = q)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Neighborhood SES (AHRQ 2019)",
    y = "Predicted pharmacy access score (conditional quantile)",
    title = "Quantile GAM: adjusted SES–access relationship across the distribution",
    subtitle = "Curves shown for τ = 0.1, 0.5, 0.9; other covariates held at sample means"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}


taus <- c(0.1, 0.5, 0.9)

fits_q_race <- lapply(taus, function(tau) {
  qgam(
    lwc_A5 ~ s(AHRQ_SES_2019) + county +
      hisp_pc + raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc + raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc + raceeth_other_pc,
    data = gam_data,
    qu = tau
  )
})
names(fits_q_race) <- paste0("tau_", taus)


# ---- Helper: choose a valid baseline row from your data ----
# This avoids the "means don't sum to 1" issue.
pick_baseline <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    transmute(
      AHRQ_SES_2019,
      county,
      hisp_pc,
      raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc,
      raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc,
      raceeth_other_pc,
      white_pc = 1 - (hisp_pc + raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc + raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc + raceeth_other_pc)
    ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(white_pc), white_pc > 0) %>%
    slice_min(order_by = abs(white_pc - median(white_pc, na.rm = TRUE)), n = 1)
}

baseline <- pick_baseline(gam_data)
baseline

make_race_quantile_df <- function(focal_var, fits, baseline_row,
                                  delta_pp = seq(0, 100, by = 0.5)) {

  # pull baseline values
  base <- baseline_row %>%
    select(AHRQ_SES_2019, county,
           hisp_pc, raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc, raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, raceeth_other_pc)

  white0 <- 1 - (base$hisp_pc + base$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
                 base$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc + base$raceeth_other_pc)

  # feasible delta such that white remains >= 0
  delta_pp2 <- delta_pp[delta_pp/100 <= white0]

  # if nothing feasible, try a smaller range automatically
  if (length(delta_pp2) == 0) {
    delta_pp2 <- seq(0, max(0, white0*100), length.out = 50)
    delta_pp2 <- delta_pp2[delta_pp2/100 <= white0]
  }

  # if still empty, return NULL (bind_rows will ignore)
  if (length(delta_pp2) == 0) return(NULL)

  newdat <- base[rep(1, length(delta_pp2)), ]
  newdat$delta_pp <- delta_pp2

  # Reallocate from White to focal: increase focal by delta
  newdat[[focal_var]] <- base[[focal_var]] + delta_pp2/100

  # (optional) keep for diagnostics
  newdat$white_pc <- 1 - (newdat$hisp_pc + newdat$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
                          newdat$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc + newdat$raceeth_other_pc)

  # predict for each quantile model
  out <- bind_rows(lapply(names(fits), function(nm) {
    fit <- fits[[nm]]
    yhat <- as.numeric(predict(fit, newdata = newdat))

    data.frame(
      delta_pp = delta_pp2,
      quantile = nm,
      fit = yhat,
      focal_group = focal_var
    )
  }))

  out
}


race_vars <- c("hisp_pc",
               "raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc",
               "raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc",
               "raceeth_other_pc")

race_q_df <- bind_rows(lapply(race_vars, make_race_quantile_df,
                              fits = fits_q_race,
                              baseline_row = baseline))

# nice labels
label_map <- c(
  hisp_pc = "Hispanic (vs NH White)",
  raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc = "NH Black (vs NH White)",
  raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc = "NH Asian (vs NH White)",
  raceeth_other_pc = "Other (vs NH White)"
)

race_q_df <- race_q_df %>%
  mutate(
    focal_group = factor(focal_group, levels = race_vars, labels = label_map[race_vars]),
    quantile = factor(quantile,
                      levels = c("tau_0.1","tau_0.5","tau_0.9"),
                      labels = c("τ = 0.1","τ = 0.5","τ = 0.9"))
  )

ggplot(race_q_df, aes(x = delta_pp, y = fit, linetype = quantile)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ focal_group, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Percentage-point increase in focal group (reallocated from non-Hispanic White)",
    y = "Predicted pharmacy access score (conditional quantile)",
    title = "Quantile GAM: race/ethnicity–access relationships across the distribution",
    subtitle = "Baseline composition taken from an observed tract; SES & walkability fixed at baseline values"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```

```{r}

gam_data <- gam_data %>%
  mutate(
    race_dom = case_when(
      raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc >= 0.5 ~ "NH Black",
      hisp_pc >= 0.5 ~ "Hispanic",
      raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc >= 0.5 ~ "NH Asian",
      TRUE ~ "NH White/Other"
    ),
    race_dom = factor(race_dom)
  )

fit_ses_race_int <- gam(
  lwc_A5 ~
    s(AHRQ_SES_2019, by = race_dom, k = 10) +
    race_dom +                       # required main effect
    walkability +
    hisp_pc + raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc +
    raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc + raceeth_other_pc,
  data   = gam_data,
  family = mgcv::tw(link = "log"),
  method = "REML"
)

ses_seq <- seq(
  min(gam_data$AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(gam_data$AHRQ_SES_2019, na.rm = TRUE),
  length.out = 200
)

newdat <- expand.grid(
  AHRQ_SES_2019 = ses_seq,
  race_dom = levels(gam_data$race_dom)
) %>%
  mutate(
    walkability = mean(gam_data$walkability, na.rm = TRUE),
    hisp_pc = mean(gam_data$hisp_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_black_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_nonhisp_asian_pc, na.rm = TRUE),
    raceeth_other_pc = mean(gam_data$raceeth_other_pc, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

pr <- predict(
  fit_ses_race_int,
  newdata = newdat,
  type = "link",
  se.fit = TRUE
)

newdat <- newdat %>%
  mutate(
    fit   = exp(pr$fit),
    lower = exp(pr$fit - 1.96 * pr$se.fit),
    upper = exp(pr$fit + 1.96 * pr$se.fit)
  )

ggplot(newdat, aes(AHRQ_SES_2019, fit)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ race_dom) +
  lims(y = c(0,20))+
  theme_minimal()
```

# Uncertainty plots 

```{r}


p_A = aim1_data_final %>% 
  full_join(
      lwc_access(
        data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1"), 
             pnts_c = pnts_car_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
             pnts_w = pnts_walk_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
             iso_c = car_5,
             iso_w = isochrones_walk_5,
             n_sims = 100) %>% 
        rename("geoid" = "GEOID", "lwc_A5"= "median_A","lwc_A5_0.025" ="q0.025","lwc_A5_0.975"="q0.975", "p_A5" = "mean_p"),
      by = "geoid"
      ) %>% 
  select(geoid,median_p, q0.025_p, q0.975_p )

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, county.x, population, 
         lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, estimate_total_trans, estimate_car_truck_van, moe_car_truck_van, moe_total_trans) %>% 
  mutate(borough = case_when(
                       county.x ==  "36005" ~ "Bronx", 
                       county.x ==  "36047" ~ "Brooklyn", 
                       county.x ==  "36061" ~ "Manhattan", 
                       county.x ==  "36081" ~ "Queens", 
                       county.x ==  "36085" ~ "Staten Island"
  ),
  p_obs = estimate_car_truck_van/ estimate_total_trans,
  p_hat = truncnorm::rtruncnorm(n = 1,
                                              mean = estimate_car_truck_van/estimate_total_trans,
                                              sd = sqrt(
    ( (moe_car_truck_van/1.645)^2 / estimate_total_trans^2 ) +
    ( (estimate_car_truck_van^2 * (moe_total_trans/1.645)^2) / estimate_total_trans^4 )
  )
  , a = 0, b = 1)
  ) %>% 
  left_join(p_A %>% rename("GEOID"="geoid"),
            by = "GEOID") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = population)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = median_p),alpha = 0.3, size = 0.01) +
  geom_point(aes(y= p_obs),col = "blue",alpha = 0.3, size = 0.01) +
  geom_point(aes(y= p_hat),col = "red",alpha = 0.3, size = 0.01) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = q0.025_p, ymax = q0.975_p),
    alpha = 0.3,
    size = 0.1,
    width = 0    # ensures purely vertical bars
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Population",
    y = "Proportion Drive 95% CI",
    title = ""
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~borough)+
  scale_x_log10()+
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)




aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, county.x, population, 
         lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, estimate_total_trans, estimate_car_truck_van, moe_car_truck_van, moe_total_trans) %>% 
  mutate(borough = case_when(
                       county.x ==  "36005" ~ "Bronx", 
                       county.x ==  "36047" ~ "Brooklyn", 
                       county.x ==  "36061" ~ "Manhattan", 
                       county.x ==  "36081" ~ "Queens", 
                       county.x ==  "36085" ~ "Staten Island"
  ),
  p_obs = estimate_car_truck_van/ estimate_total_trans,
  sd_p = sqrt(
      ((moe_car_truck_van / 1.645)^2 / estimate_total_trans^2) +
      ((estimate_car_truck_van^2 * (moe_total_trans / 1.645)^2) / estimate_total_trans^4)
    )
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    p_draws = list(truncnorm::rtruncnorm(1000, mean = p_obs, sd = sd_p, a = 0, b = 1)),
    p_med = median(p_draws),
    p_lo  = quantile(p_draws, 0.025, na.rm = T),
    p_hi  = quantile(p_draws, 0.975, na.rm = T),
    p_wid = p_hi - p_lo
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  left_join(p_A %>% rename("GEOID"="geoid"),
            by = "GEOID") %>% 
 ggplot(aes(x = population, y = p_wid)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~borough, scales = "free_x") +
  lims(y = c(0,1))+
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = "Population", y = "Width of 95% CI for p") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)+
  
  
  aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, county.x, population, 
         lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, estimate_total_trans, estimate_car_truck_van, moe_car_truck_van, moe_total_trans) %>% 
  mutate(borough = case_when(
                       county.x ==  "36005" ~ "Bronx", 
                       county.x ==  "36047" ~ "Brooklyn", 
                       county.x ==  "36061" ~ "Manhattan", 
                       county.x ==  "36081" ~ "Queens", 
                       county.x ==  "36085" ~ "Staten Island"
  ),
  p_obs = estimate_car_truck_van/ estimate_total_trans
  ) %>% 
  left_join(p_A %>% rename("GEOID"="geoid"),
            by = "GEOID") %>% 
  mutate(p_lo  = q0.025_p,
    p_hi  = q0.975_p,
    p_wid = p_hi - p_lo) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = population, y = p_wid)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~borough, scales = "free_x") +
  lims(y = c(0,1))+
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = "Population", y = "H Width of 95% CI for p") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)








un_data = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars( lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, county.x, population, lwc_A5:lwc_A5_0.975) %>% 
  filter(lwc_A5_0.975<30) %>% 
  mutate(borough = case_when(
                       county.x ==  "36005" ~ "Bronx", 
                       county.x ==  "36047" ~ "Brooklyn", 
                       county.x ==  "36061" ~ "Manhattan", 
                       county.x ==  "36081" ~ "Queens", 
                       county.x ==  "36085" ~ "Staten Island"
  ),
  lwc_diff = lwc_A5_0.975 - lwc_A5_0.025,
  diff_cat = if_else(
    lwc_diff >=2, "U","N"
  ) %>% factor() %>% forcats::fct_relevel(.,"U","N"),
  diff_alpha = if_else(diff_cat == "U", 1,0.01)
  ) %>% 
  left_join(p_A %>% rename("GEOID"="geoid"),
            by = "GEOID")


ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "U"), aes(x = GEOID, y = lwc_A5, col = diff_cat),alpha = 1, size = 0.5, col = "red") +
  geom_point(data= un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "N"), aes(x = GEOID, y = lwc_A5, col = diff_cat),alpha = 0.1, size = 0.01, col = "black") +
  
  geom_errorbar(data = un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "U"),
    aes(x = GEOID, y = lwc_A5, ymin = lwc_A5_0.025, ymax = lwc_A5_0.975),
    alpha = 1,
    size = 0.5,
    width = 0    # ensures purely vertical bars
  ) +
  
  geom_errorbar(data= un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "N"),
    aes(x = GEOID, y = lwc_A5, ymin = lwc_A5_0.025, ymax = lwc_A5_0.975),
    alpha = 0.1,
    size = 0.5,
    width = 0    # ensures purely vertical bars
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Access 95% CI",
    title = ""
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ borough, scales = "free_x", nrow = 1) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
  )


ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "U"), aes(x = population, y = median_p),alpha = 1, size = 0.5, col = "red") +
  geom_point(data = un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "N"), aes(x = population, y = median_p),alpha = 0.1, size = 0.01, col = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(
    data = un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "U"),
    aes(x = population, y = median_p, ymin = q0.025_p, ymax = q0.975_p),
   alpha = 1,
    size = 0.5,
    width = 0      # ensures purely vertical bars
  ) +
  
  geom_errorbar(
    data = un_data %>% filter(diff_cat == "N"),
    aes(x = population, y = median_p, ymin = q0.025_p, ymax = q0.975_p),
    alpha = 0.1,
    size = 0.5,
    width = 0  # ensures purely vertical bars
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Population",
    y = "Proportion Drive 95% CI",
    title = ""
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~borough)+
  scale_x_log10()+
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

```


```{r}



aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975), ~replace_na(., 0)) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(
    GEOID, county.x, population,
    w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5,
    estimate_total_trans, estimate_car_truck_van,
    moe_car_truck_van, moe_total_trans
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    borough = case_when(
      county.x == "36005" ~ "Bronx", 
      county.x == "36047" ~ "Brooklyn", 
      county.x == "36061" ~ "Manhattan", 
      county.x == "36081" ~ "Queens", 
      county.x == "36085" ~ "Staten Island"
    ),
    # observed mode share
    pi_obs = estimate_car_truck_van / estimate_total_trans,

    # delta-method SD for ratio X/Y (independence approx)
    sd_pi = sqrt(
      ((moe_car_truck_van / 1.645)^2 / estimate_total_trans^2) +
      ((estimate_car_truck_van^2 * (moe_total_trans / 1.645)^2) / estimate_total_trans^4)
    ),

    # point-estimate mixture (no propagation)
    A_mix = pi_obs * c_A5 + (1 - pi_obs) * w_A5
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    # propagate pi (1000 draws per tract)
    pi_draws = list(truncnorm::rtruncnorm(
      n = 1000, mean = pi_obs, sd = sd_pi, a = 0, b = 1
    )),
    A_mix_draws = list(pi_draws[[1]] * c_A5 + (1 - pi_draws[[1]]) * w_A5),

    A_mix_med   = median(A_mix_draws[[1]], na.rm = TRUE),
    A_mix_0.025 = quantile(A_mix_draws[[1]], 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    A_mix_0.975 = quantile(A_mix_draws[[1]], 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    A_mix_wid   = A_mix_0.975 - A_mix_0.025
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
 # select(GEOID, w_A5, c_A5,lwc_A5) %>%

          data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1", 
                                  "GEOID" = "geoid") , 
                   pnts_c = pnts_car_2 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
                   pnts_w = pnts_walk_2 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),

                   iso_w = isochrones_walk_2) %>% 
            rename("no_prop_2" = "A"),
          by = "GEOID") %>%

          data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1", 
                                  "GEOID" = "geoid") , 
                   pnts_c = pnts_car_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
                   pnts_w = pnts_walk_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"), 
                   iso_c = car_5, 
                   iso_w = isochrones_walk_5) %>%

left_join(lwc_access_fixed(
          data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1",

                   pnts_w = pnts_walk_10 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),

left_join(lwc_access_fixed(

                   c_A2+c_A5+c_A10+c_A15+
                   no_prop_2+no_prop_5+no_prop_10+no_prop_15+
                   lwc_A2+lwc_A5+lwc_A10+lwc_A15, data = no_prop_data, control = my_controls) %>% 
  summary()
```

## propagation 


```{r}
 prop_acs_data %>% 
  left_join(
access_acs_propagated( data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1", 
                                  "GEOID" = "geoid") , 
                   pnts = pnts_car_2 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
                  
                   iso = isochrones_2_car,
                  
                  supply = pharm_rx %>% rename("query" = "name"),
                  support = "K",
                  n_sims = 100),
by = "GEOID"
 ) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(median_A:q0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  summarize(med_A = quantile(median_A, 0.5,na.rm = T),
            q1_A = quantile(median_A, 0.025,na.rm = T),
            q3_A = quantile(median_A, 0.975,na.rm = T),
              mean_A = mean(median_A, na.rm = T),
            sd_A = sd(median_A, na.rm = T),
            med_p = quantile(median_p, 0.5,na.rm = T) ,
            q1_p = quantile(median_p, 0.025,na.rm = T),
            q3_p = quantile(median_p, 0.975,na.rm = T),
              mean_p = mean(median_p, na.rm = T),
            sd_p = sd(median_p, na.rm = T))
```

```{r}
                  support = "w",
                  n_sims = 100),
by = "GEOID"
 ) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(median_A:q0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  summarize(med_A = quantile(median_A, 0.5,na.rm = T),
            q1_A = quantile(median_A, 0.025,na.rm = T),
            q3_A = quantile(median_A, 0.975,na.rm = T),
              mean_A = mean(median_A, na.rm = T),
            sd_A = sd(median_A, na.rm = T),
            med_p = quantile(median_p, 0.5,na.rm = T) ,
            q1_p = quantile(median_p, 0.025,na.rm = T),
            q3_p = quantile(median_p, 0.975,na.rm = T),
              mean_p = mean(median_p, na.rm = T),
            sd_p = sd(median_p, na.rm = T))

# The acs propagated 10 min access score while driving as this summary, having median IQR of 3.151673	(0,	25.87487), or a mean and sd of 5.456917	(10.24929). The average proportion that drive is 0.2 (0.0,0.7) or 0.3 (0.2). 

prop_acs_data %>% 
  left_join(
access_acs_propagated( data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1", 
                                  "GEOID" = "geoid") , 
                   pnts = pnts_walk_15 %>% rename("query" = "address1"), 
                   
                   iso = isochrones_walk_15,
                  supply = pharm_rx %>% rename("query" = "name"),
                  support = "w",
                  n_sims = 100),
by = "GEOID"
 ) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(median_A:q0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  summarize(med_A = quantile(median_A, 0.5,na.rm = T),
            q1_A = quantile(median_A, 0.025,na.rm = T),
            q3_A = quantile(median_A, 0.975,na.rm = T),
              mean_A = mean(median_A, na.rm = T),
            sd_A = sd(median_A, na.rm = T),
            med_p = quantile(median_p, 0.5,na.rm = T) ,
            q1_p = quantile(median_p, 0.025,na.rm = T),
            q3_p = quantile(median_p, 0.975,na.rm = T),
              mean_p = mean(median_p, na.rm = T),
            sd_p = sd(median_p, na.rm = T))

# The acs propagated 15 min access score while driving as this summary, having median IQR of 3.148863	(0,	25.95952), or a mean and sd of 5.446695	(10.15753). The average proportion that drive is 0.2 (0.0,0.7) or 0.3 (0.2). 
```


```{r}


prop_5 = prop_acs_data %>% 
  left_join(
access_acs_propagated( data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1", 
                                  "GEOID" = "geoid") , 
                  pnts = pnts_walk_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"), 
                   
                   iso = isochrones_walk_5,
                  
                  supply = pharm_rx %>% rename("query" = "name"),
                  support = "w",
                  n_sims = 100),
by = "GEOID"
 ) %>% 
  select(-c(q0.025, q0.975,mean_p,median_p, q0.025_p, q0.975_p)) %>% 
  rename("w_prop_A5"="median_A" ) %>% 
 # mutate_at(vars(median_A:q0.975_p), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  left_join(
access_acs_propagated( data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1", 
                                  "GEOID" = "geoid") , 
                  pnts = pnts_car_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
                  
                   iso = car_5, 
                  
                  supply = pharm_rx %>% rename("query" = "name"),
                  support = "K",
                  n_sims = 100),
by = "GEOID"
 ) %>% 
  select(-c(q0.025, q0.975,mean_p,median_p, q0.025_p, q0.975_p)) %>% 
  rename("c_prop_A5"="median_A" ) %>% 
  mutate_at(vars(c_prop_A5,w_prop_A5), ~replace_na(.,0)) 

tab_data2 <- prop_5 %>% 
  select(GEOID, c_prop_A5, w_prop_A5, lwc_A5) %>% 
  mutate(
    combined_bin = if_else(lwc_A5 < 1, "<1", ">=1"),
    walking_bin  = if_else(w_prop_A5  < 1, "<1", ">=1"),
    driving_bin  = if_else(c_prop_A5   < 1, "<1", ">=1")
  )

 tab_data2 %>%
  count(combined_bin, walking_bin) %>%
  group_by(combined_bin) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = walking_bin,
    values_from = pct,
    values_fill = 0
  )
 
 tab_data2 %>%
  count(combined_bin, driving_bin) %>%
  group_by(combined_bin) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = driving_bin,
    values_from = pct,
    values_fill = 0
  )
```

## Tract specific

```{r}

arsenal::tableby(~., data = aim1_acs_lwc5 %>% 
                   sf::st_drop_geometry() %>%  
                   select(c_A2_nyc:c_A15_nyc, 
                          w_A2_nyc:w_A15_nyc, 
                          d_A1_nyc, 
                          d_A0.5_nyc, 
                          d_A0.61_nyc),control = my_controls) %>% summary()


aim1_acs_lwc5 %>%
  select(matches("^lwc_A(2|5|10|15)_(0\\.025|0\\.975)$")) %>%
  mutate_at(vars(lwc_A2_0.025:lwc_A15_0.975), ~replace_na(.,0)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = c("catchment", "alpha"),
    names_pattern = "^lwc_(A\\d+)_(0\\.025|0\\.975)$",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = alpha,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  rename("LL" = "0.025",
         "HH" = "0.975") %>% 
  unnest(cols = c(LL,HH)) %>% 
  mutate(
    ci_width = HH - LL,
    catchment_min = as.integer(str_remove(catchment, "^A"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(catchment_min) %>% 
  group_by(catchment) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(ci_width)),
    mean = mean(ci_width, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(ci_width, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(ci_width, na.rm = TRUE),
    q025 = quantile(ci_width, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    q975 = quantile(ci_width, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(as.integer(str_remove(catchment, "^A")))
```

```{r}
keep_geoid <- aim1_acs_lwc5 %>%

  unique()
length(keep_geoid)  

 lwc_access(
  data = data1 %>% rename(query = address1),
  pnts_c = pnts_car_5 %>% rename(query = address1),
  pnts_w = pnts_walk_5 %>% rename(query = address1),
  iso_c = car_5,
  iso_w = isochrones_walk_5,
  n_sims = 100,
  keep = keep_geoid
) %>% 
   summarize(med = medianq1q3(median_A, na.rm = T))
```
