```{r}
        data = data1 %>% rename("query" = "address1"), 
             pnts_c = pnts_car_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
             pnts_w = pnts_walk_5 %>% rename("query" = "address1"),
             iso_c = car_5,
             iso_w = isochrones_walk_5,
             n_sims = 100,
        keep = keep_geoid) %>% 
        summarise(
      median_A = median(median_A_city, na.rm = TRUE),
      q0.025   = quantile(median_A_city, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
      q0.975   = quantile(median_A_city, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
      width    = q0.975 - q0.025,
      
      median_p = median(median_p_city, na.rm = TRUE),
      q0.025_p   = quantile(median_p_city, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
      q0.975_p  = quantile(median_p_city, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
      width_p    = q0.975_p - q0.025_p,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate(pov_q = case_when(
    pov_below_pc <= quantile(pov_below_pc, 0.25, na.rm = T) ~ "<= 8",
    pov_below_pc > quantile(pov_below_pc, 0.25, na.rm = T) &  pov_below_pc <= quantile(pov_below_pc, 0.50, na.rm = T) ~ "> 8, <= 14",
   pov_below_pc > quantile(pov_below_pc, 0.50, na.rm = T) &  pov_below_pc <= quantile(pov_below_pc, 0.75, na.rm = T) ~ "> 14, <= 24",
    pov_below_pc > quantile(pov_below_pc, 0.75, na.rm = T) ~ "> 24"
  ) %>% factor() %>% forcats::fct_relevel(.,"<= 8","> 8, <= 14","> 14, <= 24")
  ) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_sf(aes(fill = pov_q))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "Percent Below Poverty")+
  theme_void()

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate(walk_q = case_when(
    walkability <= quantile(walkability, 0.25, na.rm = T) ~ "<= 84",
    walkability > quantile(walkability, 0.25, na.rm = T) &  walkability <= quantile(walkability, 0.50, na.rm = T) ~ "> 84, <= 92",
   walkability > quantile(walkability, 0.50, na.rm = T) &  walkability <= quantile(walkability, 0.75, na.rm = T) ~ "> 92, <= 96",
    walkability > quantile(walkability, 0.75, na.rm = T) ~ "> 96"
  ) %>% factor()
  ) %>% 
  ggplot()+
  geom_sf(aes(fill = walk_q))+
  scale_fill_viridis_d(name = "Walkability")+
  theme_void()

```

## LISA

```{r}

nb <- poly2nb(aim1_map_acs_lwc5)
lw <- nb2listw(nb, style="W", zero.policy = T)

cards <- card(nb)
table(cards == 0)  # how many isolates?

keep <- cards > 0
nb <- poly2nb(aim1_map_acs_lwc5[keep,])
lw <- nb2listw(nb, style="W", zero.policy = T)

biv = localmoran_bv(nsim = 100,
              x = aim1_acs_lwc5$w_A5[keep],
           listw = lw,
           zero.policy = TRUE,
           y = aim1_acs_lwc5$c_A5[keep])



x_raw <- aim1_acs_lwc5$w_A5[keep]
y_raw <- aim1_acs_lwc5$c_A5[keep]
x <- as.numeric(scale(x_raw))
y <- as.numeric(scale(y_raw))

# Spatial lag of y (Wy)
lag_y <- lag.listw(lw, y, zero.policy = TRUE)

# Permutation p-values from localmoran_bv
# (column name can vary by version, so use this robust approach)
p_col <- grep("^Pr\\(|^p\\.|^pvalue$|^p\\.value$|^Pr\\(\\)$", colnames(biv), value = TRUE)
p_col
# If p_col prints more than one, pick the one that looks like a p-value column.
# Most commonly it's "Pr(z != E(Ii))" or similar:
pvals <- biv[, grep("Pr", colnames(biv))[1]]

# Quadrants: HH/LL/HL/LH based on x and Wy
quad <- case_when(
  x >= 0 & lag_y >= 0 ~ "High-High",
  x <  0 & lag_y <  0 ~ "Low-Low",
  x >= 0 & lag_y <  0 ~ "High-Low",
  x <  0 & lag_y >= 0 ~ "Low-High",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

alpha <- 0.05
cluster <- ifelse(pvals < alpha, quad, "Not significant")
cluster <- factor(cluster, levels = c("High-High","Low-Low","High-Low","Low-High","Not significant"))

cluster_full <- rep("No neighbors", nrow(aim1_map_acs_lwc5))
cluster_full[keep] <- as.character(cluster)

 aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>%
  mutate(bilisa = factor(cluster_full,
                         levels = c("High-High","Low-Low","High-Low","Low-High","Not significant","No neighbors"))) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = bilisa), color = NA) +
  coord_sf(datum = NA) +
  labs(fill = "BiLISA cluster",
       title = "Bivariate LISA clusters: Walking (x) vs spatial lag of Driving (Wy)") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}

moran.test(aim1_acs_lwc5$w_A5[keep], lw)
moran.test(aim1_acs_lwc5$c_A5[keep], lw)

cor(aim1_acs_lwc5$w_A5, aim1_acs_lwc5$c_A5)

cor(lag.listw(lw, x), lag.listw(lw, y))
```

# Models2

```{r}

glm(factor(less_than) ~ population, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% mutate(less_than = if_else(lwc_A5<1,1,0))) %>% summary()

glm(factor(less_than) ~ population, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% mutate(less_than = as.numeric(c_A5<1))) %>% summary()

glm(factor(less_than) ~ population, family = binomial(link = "logit"), data = aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% mutate(less_than = as.numeric(w_A5<1))) %>% summary()


dat_glmm <- aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>%
  mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(GEOID, population, w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5, county.x, p_A5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5),
    names_to = "mode",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mode = factor(mode),
    mode = relevel(mode, ref = "c_A5"),
    GEOID = factor(GEOID),
    less_than = as.numeric(score < 1),
    population = population/10000
  )

fit <- lme4::glmer(
  less_than ~ mode + (1 | GEOID),
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = dat_glmm %>% mutate()
)

summary(fit)

fit2 <- lme4::glmer(
  less_than ~ population + mode  + (1 | GEOID),
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = dat_glmm %>% mutate()
)

summary(fit2)

fit3 <- lme4::glmer(
  less_than ~ population + mode + p_A5 + (1 | GEOID),
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = dat_glmm %>% mutate()
)

summary(fit3)

fit4 <- lme4::glmer(
  less_than ~ mode + p_A5 + (1 | GEOID),
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  data = dat_glmm %>% mutate()
)

summary(fit4)

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>%
  mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(GEOID, population, w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5, county.x, p_A5) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5),
    names_to = "mode",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    less_than = if_else(score < 1,1,0)
  ) %>% 
  group_by(mode) %>% 
  summarize(n = n(),
            count = sum(less_than,na.rm = T),
            prop =  count/2222)


aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5) %>% 
  
  mutate(
    combined_bin = if_else(lwc_A5 < 1, 1, 0),
    walking_bin  = if_else(w_A5   < 1, 1, 0),
    driving_bin  = if_else(c_A5   < 1, 1, 0)
  ) %>% 
   summarize(c = sum(combined_bin),
             w = sum(walking_bin),
             d = sum(driving_bin))

aim1_map_acs_lwc5 %>% 
  mutate(across(w_A5:lwc_A5_0.975, ~replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  sf::st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(GEOID, w_A5, c_A5, lwc_A5) %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    w_A5:lwc_A5,
    names_to = "mode",
    values_to = "scores"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    cat = if_else(scores < 1, 1, 0)
  ) %>% 
  group_by(mode) %>% 
   summarize(cat = sum(cat,na.rm = T))
   
   
ggeffects::ggpredict(fit, terms = "mode")
```
